mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER ( MEMBERID, EMAIL, PASSWORD, NAME, PHONE, TYPE, STATUS, LAST_LOGIN_AT, DORMANT_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, MUST_CHANGE_PASSWORD_YN, BIRTH_DATE, GENDER ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{type}, #{status}, NULL, NULL, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{mustChangePasswordYn}, #{birthDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{gender, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER_AUTHORITY (AUTH_NUM, FK_MEMBERID, AUTHORITY) VALUES (SEQ_MEMBER_AUTHORITY_AUTH_NUM.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{authority})

INSERT INTO TBL_COMPANY ( FK_MEMBERID, COMPANY_NAME, BIZ_NO, INDUSTRY_CODE, CEO_NAME, APPROVED_YN, APPROVAL_AT, REJECT_REASON, INFO_CREATED_AT, INFO_UPDATED_AT, ZIP_CODE, ADDR1, ADDR2, LAT, LNG ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{companyName}, #{bizNo}, #{industryCode}, #{ceoName}, 0, NULL, NULL, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{zipCode}, #{addr1}, #{addr2}, #{lat, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{lng, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.select: SELECT MEMBERID AS memberId , PASSWORD AS password , TYPE AS type , STATUS AS status FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE MEMBERID = #{memberId}
SELECT AUTHORITY FROM TBL_MEMBER_AUTHORITY WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} ORDER BY AUTH_NUM
mapper.update: MERGE INTO TBL_LOGIN_SECURITY t USING (SELECT #{memberId} AS FK_MEMBERID, #{now} AS NOWVAL FROM dual) s ON (t.FK_MEMBERID = s.FK_MEMBERID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.FAIL_COUNT = t.FAIL_COUNT + 1, t.LAST_FAIL_AT = s.NOWVAL WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (FK_MEMBERID, FAIL_COUNT, LAST_FAIL_AT) VALUES (s.FK_MEMBERID, 1, s.NOWVAL)
UPDATE TBL_LOGIN_SECURITY SET FAIL_COUNT = 0, LAST_FAIL_AT = NULL WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT MEMBERID AS memberId, STATUS AS status, TYPE AS type, LAST_LOGIN_AT AS lastLoginAt, MUST_CHANGE_PASSWORD_YN AS mustChangePasswordYn FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE MEMBERID = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_MEMBER SET STATUS = 3, DORMANT_AT = #{now}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBERID = #{memberId}
UPDATE TBL_MEMBER SET LAST_LOGIN_AT = #{now}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBERID = #{memberId}
UPDATE TBL_MEMBER SET STATUS = 1, DORMANT_AT = NULL, LAST_LOGIN_AT = #{now}, MUST_CHANGE_PASSWORD_YN = 1, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBERID = #{memberId}
UPDATE TBL_MEMBER SET MUST_CHANGE_PASSWORD_YN = #{mustChangePasswordYn}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBERID = #{memberId}
UPDATE TBL_MEMBER SET PASSWORD = #{encodedPassword}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBERID = #{memberId}

MERGE INTO TBL_REFRESHTOKEN t USING ( SELECT #{memberId} AS MEMBERID, #{refreshToken} AS RT_VALUE FROM dual ) s ON (t.MEMBERID = s.MEMBERID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.RT_VALUE = s.RT_VALUE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (MEMBERID, RT_VALUE) VALUES (s.MEMBERID, s.RT_VALUE)
